title: Lloyd is Cast Out
overview: Lloyd grows up under the tutelage of Merlin, then becomes an adventurer under the Hero. Later, he's cast out.

title: Lloyd is Recruited
overview: During his recruitment Lloyd learns the party's previous white mage has a sick sister, so he heals her.

title: Lloyd Sets Out
overview: After learning about their quest, Lloyd travels with his new party and fights monsters alongside them.

title: Lloyd Gives Support
overview: The party reaches their quest's farm and fights off thousands of manipulated monsters with Lloyd's support.

title: Lloyd to the Rescue
overview: Lloyd and the party race back to aid Ishtar, only to encounter a group of demons holding a beastwoman captive.

title: Lloyd Frees Them
overview: Lina rallies Ishtar's defenders while Lloyd & Kureha free a 2nd horde of monsters and return to save Ishtar.

title: Lloyd Saves Ishtar
overview: Most monsters left, but golems are attacking Ishtar. Lloyd enhances the defenders and they save the city.

title: Lloyd Stays at a Hot Spring
overview: The party rests in a hot spring town. Silica masters a spell. Daggas gets a shield. Llyod improves his magic.

title: The S-Rank Adventurers Strive to Get Stronger
overview: Cross and Yui each meet someone new who helps them grow stronger while Lloyd improves his magic.

title: Lloyd Fights
overview: Lloyd's party gets attacked by demons, and they fight one of the four great generals to protect Claire.

title: Lloyd Flies!
overview: Lloyd and his party race through the skies and challenge Grist to a rematch in order to rescue Claire.

title: Lloyd Is Aware He Lacks Power
overview: The party escapes the crashing blimp and fights to unmerge the chimera. Yet using ancient magic is taboo.
